title: Senior Frontend Developer at Grofers Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Grofers Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Grofers Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About Grofers Advisory Limited:
Grofers Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Advisory Limited!
